Footer.brandLine: Car Financial & Administrative Intelligence — powered by AI. Cost tracking, OBD2 diagnostics, document scanning, and an advisor that actually knows your car.

StoreBadges.scanHint: Scan the QR or tap to open.

Hero.h1: A second opinion for your car.
Hero.quote: The first AI that's actually seen what your car has seen.
Hero.body: Receipts, OBD2 codes, repair history, documents. CarFai reads them all — then answers questions a search engine never could.
Hero.imagePlaceholder: hero image slot — run `npm run gen:hero`
Hero.imageAlt: Editorial still-life: open glove box with documents on the right, phone with the CarFai score 87 in the centre, analog gauges on the left, all bathed in golden-hour light.

Problem.h2Line1: Owning a car is expensive and confusing.
Problem.h2Line2: We didn't fix the cost. We made it less confusing.
Problem.body: Most car apps are a glorified spreadsheet, or a service-shop upsell, or a chatbot that hasn't seen your specific vehicle. CarFai reads your maintenance records, your OBD2 scans, your country-specific costs — and answers questions about your car.

ScanTrack.step1Body: Snap any receipt, repair order, registration, or quote. The model pulls amount, vendor, date, and category before you put the phone down.
ScanTrack.step1Alt: CarFai Review & Refine screen showing date, vendor and amount auto-extracted from a maintenance receipt, plus AI-inferred type, category, and line items.
ScanTrack.step2Body: Fuel, insurance, maintenance, parts, parking, tickets — categorised at the line-item level. Tax-deductible flags stay flagged.
ScanTrack.step2Alt: Documents screen grouping receipts into Contravention, Fuel, Insurance, Maintenance, Parking, and Toll folders.
ScanTrack.step3Title: See what it actually costs you.
ScanTrack.step3Body: Per month. Per category. Per vehicle. Per year-over-year. Without a single manual entry.
ScanTrack.step3Alt: Analytics screen with monthly spending totals, average per month, document counts, and trend chart.

Maintenance.h2: Everything that breaks down — predicted, not surprised.
Maintenance.obd2Alt: CarFai OBD2 dashboard: 2 fault codes (P0000 info, P0043 warning), key readings (battery 13.1 V, coolant 63 °C, odometer 65,415 km), and a 30-day drive summary.
Maintenance.bullet1Body: CarFai reads every service record, owner manual interval, and the way you actually drive — then schedules each upcoming service to a real date, not a vague "every 6 months".
Maintenance.bullet2Body: Plug in any OBD2 adapter. Live engine, transmission, battery, and fuel-system data — interpreted in plain language, not in P-codes you have to Google.
Maintenance.bullet3Body: Insurance renewal, registration, inspection. Scanned from your receipts once, surfaced on the calendar forever. No more missed-renewal late fees.

Valuation.h2: Know what your car is actually worth.
Valuation.body: CarFai cross-references current market listings, your service history, accident flags, and what other owners in your country are paying — then shows you a defended value with every factor that moves the number.
Valuation.imageAlt: CarFai vehicle valuation screen showing the estimated value, market band, and applied factors.

Advisor.body: The advisor reads your service history, your OBD2 scans, your country, your model, your driving habits — and answers from your data first. Generic web answers second.
Advisor.question: "Why is my insurance higher than last year?"
Advisor.answer: Two reasons: your renewal cycle hit the post-3-year premium reset, and you added an at-fault claim in March. The benchmark for your model + age in Quebec is $1,840/year; you're at $2,210. Shop now or wait six months for the claim to age into a lower bracket.
Advisor.imageAlt: CarFai AI Advisor screen showing a question and an answer.

Fleet.h2: One product. From your weekend car to your 200-vehicle yard.
Fleet.card1Title: Pick a fleet. See what's overdue.
Fleet.card1Body: Same product as the personal app, plus the org switcher. A driver sees their own car; an owner sees the whole fleet.
Fleet.card1Alt: B2B home screen for the Entr organization showing fleet analytics, a 2024 Lamborghini Urus with an oil-change-overdue flag, and driver assignment.
Fleet.card2Title: Team, vehicles, docs, AI usage. One screen.
Fleet.card2Body: Seats used, vehicles, documents handled, AI tokens remaining. Quick-actions for inviting members, adding vehicles, opening analytics.
Fleet.card2Alt: Fleet overview screen showing team 7/20, 8 vehicles, 25 documents, AI actions remaining, plus quick-action shortcuts.
Fleet.card3Title: Spend by category. Top cost vehicles. /km or total.
Fleet.card3Body: Per-period rollups with category breakdown and a per-vehicle cost leaderboard. Toggle between total spend and per-km efficiency.
Fleet.card3Alt: Fleet analytics screen with a 12-month spend-by-category bar chart and a top-5 cost-vehicles list led by a 2022 Ferrari 458.

PricingSection.h2: One price ladder. Pick the rung you actually need.
PricingSection.body: Free is genuinely free — no trial timer. Every paid plan rolls leftover tokens to the next month so a slow month isn't wasted.
PricingSection.tier1Body: Add 1 vehicle. Scan up to 50 documents a year. Basic analytics.
PricingSection.tier2Body: Up to 3 vehicles. Detailed analytics. Document exports. No AI Advisor.
PricingSection.tier3Body: Everything in Starter, plus the AI Advisor with vehicle valuation, OBD2 reasoning, and detailed analysis.
PricingSection.tier4Body: Up to 50 vehicles. Team roles. Org-wide analytics. Fleet-grade advisor with multi-vehicle Q&A.
PricingSection.tier5Body: Up to 200 vehicles. Driver vs manager scope. Cost leaderboards. Per-period accountant exports.

ClosingCTA.body: Add one car. Scan one receipt. Ask one question. If it doesn't make the next 30 minutes of car ownership easier, close the app.

PricingPage.metaDescription: CarFai pricing — five tiers, from free for one car to fleet management at scale. Token rollover on every paid plan; no card required for the free tier.
PricingPage.h1: One ladder. Pick the rung you actually need.
PricingPage.intro: Free is genuinely free — no trial timer. Every paid plan rolls leftover tokens to the next month so a slow month is not wasted. Prices below in USD; in-app prices are localized.
PricingPage.comparisonIntro: What you get on each plan. Everything in a lower tier is included in the tier above it.
PricingPage.faq1Q: Is the free tier really free, with no trial timer?
PricingPage.faq1A: Yes. The free tier is permanent — one vehicle, basic analytics, 50 scanned documents per year, no AI Advisor. No card on file.
PricingPage.faq2Q: What is a token, and what happens if I run out?
PricingPage.faq2A: Tokens measure the AI work CarFai does on your behalf — scanning a receipt, answering an Advisor question, running a Detailed Analysis. Each plan ships a monthly bucket. If you do not use them in a month, leftover tokens roll over to the next month on every paid plan. If you exhaust them, you can buy a one-time Token Pack from the in-app settings or wait for the next monthly refill.
PricingPage.faq3A: Yes — upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing period. Token balances on paid tiers carry forward.
PricingPage.faq4Q: How does the 3-day free trial work?
PricingPage.faq4A: Some paid tiers offer a 3-day trial. You get the full feature set for 3 days; cancel before the trial ends and you are not charged. The trial is enforced by Apple / Google per account, so it can only be used once per Apple ID or Google account.
PricingPage.faq5A: No — prices are localized by Apple and Google to your region. The figures above are USD references; you will see your currency in-app.
PricingPage.faq6A: Manage your subscription directly in the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android) — the same place you manage every other subscription on your device.

ContactPage.metaDescription: Get in touch with CarFai — questions, feedback, partnership, or just to say hi.
ContactPage.intro: CarFai is a small operation. The same person who shipped the feature also reads the inbox. Email is the fastest path.
ContactPage.directEmailHint: Tap to open in your mail app.
ContactPage.reason1Title: Got a question, idea, or just want to say hi?
ContactPage.reason1Body: We read every message. Replies usually within one business day.
ContactPage.reason2Title: Something broken or confusing in the app?
ContactPage.reason2Body: Tell us what happened, what device you were on, and what you expected. The more detail the faster we can help.
ContactPage.reason3Title: Talking about fleet pricing, integrations, or a partnership?
ContactPage.reason3Body: B2B onboarding for organizations up to 200 vehicles is live; enterprise pricing is custom. Tell us about your operation.
ContactPage.footnote: We answer in English and French. Operating hours roughly 09:00–18:00 Eastern Time, Monday through Friday. Security or privacy concerns get prioritised — mention them in your subject line.

SupportPage.metaDescription: CarFai help — common questions, account and billing, OBD2 troubleshooting, privacy. Plus a direct line to email support.
SupportPage.h1Line2: And a real person when you need one.
SupportPage.bannerNote: Usual response time: within one business day. Security and privacy concerns get bumped to the front of the queue — mention them in your subject line.
SupportPage.footnote: System status: live status page coming with v1.1. In the meantime, if you suspect an outage, email us — we will tell you what we know.
SupportPage.faq11Q: How do I cancel my subscription?
SupportPage.faq11A: Open the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android) on the device you subscribed from, find CarFai in your subscriptions, and tap Cancel. CarFai itself cannot cancel subscriptions on your behalf — that flow is owned entirely by Apple / Google.
SupportPage.faq12Q: How do I get a refund?
SupportPage.faq12A: Refund requests go through the App Store or Google Play, not through CarFai. On iOS: reportaproblem.apple.com. On Android: Google Play → Order History → Report a problem. We will support your refund request if you let us know — email us with the date of purchase and your account email.
SupportPage.faq13Q: I switched tiers. When does it take effect?
SupportPage.faq13A: Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing period — you keep the higher tier's features until then. Token balances on paid tiers carry forward.
SupportPage.faq14Q: I deleted my account by accident.
SupportPage.faq14A: Account deletion is permanent and immediate — we do not keep a recovery window. If you deleted within the last 30 days, email us with your old account email and we will check whether any encrypted snapshot can be restored. No guarantees.
SupportPage.faq21Q: Why does the Advisor say "I don't have enough data"?
SupportPage.faq21A: The Advisor refuses to invent numbers. If you have not scanned receipts yet, or your vehicle has fewer than 3 community comparables, some answers will say so explicitly. Scan a few receipts and the Advisor will start drawing from your data first.
SupportPage.faq22Q: How accurate is the vehicle valuation?
SupportPage.faq22A: The valuation shows a confidence band based on how many comparable listings and community records back the estimate. "Low" confidence usually means we found fewer than 3 comparables in your region. As more drivers in your country / model / trim use CarFai, confidence improves.
SupportPage.faq23Q: Can the Advisor get things wrong?
SupportPage.faq23A: Yes. AI outputs are flagged as AI-generated in-app and should be treated as a second opinion, not gospel. For anything safety-critical (brake faults, engine warnings) consult a qualified mechanic. See our AI Disclosure for details.
SupportPage.faq31Q: Which OBD2 adapter should I buy?
SupportPage.faq31A: Any Bluetooth 4.0+ adapter that supports the ELM327 protocol works. We have tested Veepeak, Vgate iCar, and OBDLink MX+ on both iOS and Android. Avoid Wi-Fi-only adapters — iOS does not allow third-party apps to use Wi-Fi OBD2 dongles.
SupportPage.faq32Q: My adapter pairs in Bluetooth settings but CarFai can't see it.
SupportPage.faq32A: In CarFai, do NOT pair the adapter through your phone's system Bluetooth menu first. Open CarFai → OBD2 → Scan and let CarFai pair it directly. If it was already paired in system settings, "Forget" it there and try again from inside CarFai.
SupportPage.faq33Q: I see fault codes I don't recognize.
SupportPage.faq33A: Tap any fault code in the OBD2 dashboard for a plain-language explanation. Codes flagged with the orange WARNING badge are emissions-related; INFO codes are typically not safety-critical.
SupportPage.faq41Q: How do I export everything you have on me?
SupportPage.faq41A: In-app: Settings → Privacy → Export my data. We send a ZIP to your registered email within 7 days. The export covers vehicles, documents, OBD2 history, AI Advisor conversations, and subscription metadata.
SupportPage.faq42A: In-app: Settings → Privacy → Delete account. Action is immediate and permanent.
SupportPage.faq43Q: Who do you share my data with?
SupportPage.faq43A: We never sell your data. We share it only with sub-processors strictly necessary to provide the service. The full list is in our
